name: David
history: Works in an educational setting with children who have learning disabilities. Describes being pampered by parents and having minimal consequences earlier in life. Ongoing conflicts with authority figures.
intermediate_belief: I need to excel to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I make mistakes, I am not good enough.
coping_strategies: Tries to outperform siblings and peers to gain approval.
situation: Encouraging students to socialize and participate in campus activities, with results falling short of expectations.
auto_thought: I must do better; there is no room for mistakes.
behavior: Becomes grumpy and frustrated when unable to meet self-imposed high standards.
